input_text: A coffee cup broke. Americans cannot disappear. Anna handed Mark a key. The students studied hard and passed the exam. Mike is male. A surgeon, Dr. Smith, entered the room. The cake was eaten. Riga is not in Estonia. A village road was narrow. Winona is a cat. If X1 is a grandfather of Y1, Y1 is a grandchild of X1. These links present the many viewpoints that existed. Tallinn is a city. Sandra travelled to the office. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. Elephants are big. Apparently, Tom left early. John's brother has a car. The tree was cut by the farmer. Eve forgot to lock the door. The nice Emajogi is 80 kilometers long. A mouse was white. Mary was heard to sing. The children playing in the garden laughed. The length of Nile is 10 meters. Mr Dursley is a catholic. Clinton defeated Dole. Agatha is in trouble. The letter was written in June. The rain continued. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. The stone was heavy. Earth contains Europe. John's sister has a car?
